holdings.infoBox: IGRO is an equity ETF with a total of 611 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 3.75%, Royal Bank of Canada at 3.21%, British American Tobacco p.l.c. at 2.97%, Nestlé at 2.72%, and Novo Nordisk at 2.72%.

overview.description: The iShares International Dividend Growth ETF (IGRO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks an index of international equities that have growing dividends. IGRO was launched on May 17, 2016 and is issued by BlackRock.
